response.step_by_step_log: 1. Analyzed video and noted dialogue until 02:22. 2. Identified the start of the musical performance at 02:22. 3. Used on-screen text to identify song title "ビビデバ" (Bibideba) and producer "ツミキ" (Tsumiki). 4. Performed a search with the query '"Bibideba" Tsumiki Japanese and English lyrics' to retrieve lyrics. 5. Mapped the findings to the JSON schema.
response.global_summary: A video featuring a dialogue segment between three Hololive VTubers (Takanashi Kiara, Mori Calliope, and Ninomae Ina'nis) followed by a live performance of the song "Bibideba" (ビビデバ).

scenes.description: A conversation between three virtual characters (Takanashi Kiara, Mori Calliope, and Ninomae Ina'nis) on a stage. They are discussing a rehearsal or performance.
The three virtual characters perform a choreographed dance and song on a brightly lit stage. The song title and credits appear on-screen.
scenes.performer_in_video: Takanashi Kiara, Mori Calliope, Ninomae Ina'nis

Life's just wishing for a miracle
Watch me do-do-do-do-do
It's a magic act with no tricks involved
